description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, set on a rectangular green lawn. The structure features large windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light, and a visible open-plan interior with distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas. A cherry blossom tree is positioned adjacent to one side of the house, adding a touch of landscaping and shade. The front facade includes a small porch area with steps leading up to the main entrance, and the rear side has a patio space. The exterior walls are finished in a clean white, with some wooden accents visible on doors and furniture. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on open space and functional living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a small front porch, set on a green lawn with a cherry blossom tree beside it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, and a clear view into the living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, the cherry blossom tree, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tree prominently in the foreground, showing the back wall and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the garage doors, more windows, and the side entrance, with the tree in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple sides
